## MoldSelector() function

Mold selector component with full CRUD support.

Provides selection from available molds, with optional ability to add new molds and remove existing ones from the options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function MoldSelector({ state, actions, getMoldName, onAddMold, showRemove, label, disabled }: IMoldSelectorProps): React.ReactElement | null;
```

**Returns:**

React.ReactElement \| null

Mold selector element

## Example


```tsx
const { state, actions } = useMoldSelection({...});

<MoldSelector
  state={state}
  actions={actions}
  getMoldName={(id) => runtime.getMold(id)?.name ?? id}
  onAddMold={() => setShowMoldPicker(true)}
/>
```
